subject: Hercule (Mr. Satan) in martial arts pose, wearing dark gi with prominent black mustache
description: A heavyset humanoid man is depicted in a close-up to mid-shot, arms raised dramatically in a boastful martial arts display pose. He has a prominent thick black mustache and dark wild hair. He wears a dark martial arts gi or jacket. His expression is exaggerated and theatrical — a wide-open mouth and dramatic arm gesture suggesting bravado or a victory pose. No energy aura, no ki effects, no supernatural elements are visible. The background has warm reddish-orange tones suggesting a dramatic backdrop or crowd lighting.
foreground: Heavyset man with thick black mustache and dark hair, arms raised in theatrical martial arts display
